## Summary
Describe what changed in this pull request.

## Related Issue
Link the issue this PR addresses.

## Why
Explain why this change is needed and how it supports the issue goal.

## How to Test
List the manual or automated checks used to verify the change.

## Screenshots, if UI change
Add before/after screenshots or screen recordings for UI changes.

## Checklist
- [ ] Read AGENTS.md first
- [ ] Keep changes small and issue-driven
- [ ] Do not modify unrelated files
- [ ] Do not create extra markdown files
- [ ] Do not commit secrets or .env files
- [ ] Tests or manual checks were completed and documented above

## Risk
Describe the risk level, affected areas, and rollback plan if needed.

## Follow-up
List follow-up work that should be handled in a separate issue or PR.
